title.en: But this treats the symptoms but not the root c...

content.en:
The Xuanxu Saint Realm was promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, and this matter could not be concealed at all.

Although the Xuanxu Holy Realm is completely closed and only under the control of the human race, there can be a large number of forces outside the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and there are even power divisions of the Dark Holy Realm.

Therefore, when the Xuanxu Saint Realm was promoted to the Ancestral Realm, these forces were naturally the first to know about it, and immediately notified those forces in the Dark Sacred Realm.

Even if Ye Tian killed these forces in Yinian Town, he could indeed guarantee that the news would not be leaked, and he could even block the Daoshan Realm and prevent people from entering and leaving.

But this treats the symptoms but not the root cause.

If those power divisions are destroyed, the Dark Sanctuary will definitely send people to investigate, and it will still be exposed when the time comes.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't care.

Exposed, exposed, he has now been promoted to the top ancestor combat power, naturally he is not afraid of other ancestors, not even the two top ancestors of the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor.

......

The Dark Holy Gate.

At this time, the Holy Ancestor was cultivating and suddenly received a piece of information.

"The Xuanxu Saint Realm was promoted to the Ancestral Realm?"

The Holy Ancestor was shocked.

In the past, he didn't know what the Xuanxu Holy Realm was, because he didn't pay attention to it.

But now, he knows the origin of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, which is the place of origin of the human race and the place of the ancestor of ten thousand laws.

It is said that the Xuanxu Holy Realm was just an ordinary small universe at the beginning, and then it was promoted step by step, and then it was promoted to the Holy Realm.

It is not difficult to be promoted to the Holy Realm, he can cultivate a world to be promoted to the Holy Realm, just pay some precious treasures.

Can be promoted to the ancestral realm, how is this possible?

He simply couldn't do it, and neither could the other ancestors.

If he could cultivate the Ancestral Realm, he would have cultivated it a long time ago.

A Dark Holy Land can only give birth to one Primordial Ancestral Realm and the Ten Ancestral Realms, which is the limit.

If it is not a dark holy land, the ancestral realm cannot be born at all.

For example, the headquarters of the Eternal Sect is actually only a treasure in the Dark Forbidden Realm, but it is not the Ancestral Realm.

The Daoshan Realm is just a realm, how could an Ancestral Realm be born?

This is not normal!

If this situation can be replicated, even if it takes a little longer, then the Dark Holy Gate will cultivate one Ancestral Realm after another, what is this concept?

Once he controls the resources of the Ancestral Realm, he can go further.

Wow!

The Holy Ancestor crossed the long distance in one step and descended to the outside of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

At the same time, the other Ancestors also descended one by one, and even the Destruction Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain was the first to get the news and came here.

......

"Sure enough, it's the Ancestral Realm!"

Destruction of the Ancestors shocked.

At this moment, Ye Tian walked out of the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

"Ancestors, what are you doing here?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, your Dao Mountain Realm is only a realm, why was the Ancestral Realm born, and it is the Ancestral Realm that was promoted from the Saint Realm? I have never heard that the Saint Realm can also be promoted to the Ancestral Realm!"

The Holy Ancestor asked.

"I don't know, it's suddenly promoted, and I'm weird!"

Ye Tian pretended to be confused.

"Let's go in and see?" suggested the Ancestor of Destruction.

Rumble!!!!

A rich killing intent permeated from Ye Tian's body.

"Everyone, the Xuanxu Holy Realm is the place of origin of our human race, and naturally no one is allowed to enter, otherwise what secrets our human race has, wouldn't it be impossible to stop your investigation, which force does not have a little secret, so your proposal, I refuse. "

"Besides, even if the Xuanxu Saint Realm is promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, there is really any secret, it is also a matter of our human race, what does it have to do with you?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Ancestor of Destruction said with a gloomy face: "Ten Thousand Law Ancestor, the Holy Realm can be promoted to the Ancestral Realm, this matter has too much impact, we must know the reason, if you have a way to raise the Holy Realm to the Ancestral Realm, please sell this method to us, otherwise you will offend all the Ancestors!"

"Is it up to you?"

Ye Tian said disdainfully.

The Holy Ancestor said: "Ten Thousand Law Ancestors, let's hand over the method of cultivating the Ancestral Realm, otherwise you can't stop me and the Destruction Ancestor, the two top ancestors." This is not the Dark Soul Domain, if it is in the Dark Soul Domain, you and your clone Aoba Ancestor join forces, which is equivalent to two top ancestors, but here, your Aoba Ancestor clone can only exert the combat power of the elite ancestor, and it can't compete with us!"

When the Holy Ancestor ends, to deal with Ye Tian is equivalent to uniting with the Ancestor of Destruction.

At this time, even with the help of the Realm Ancestor and the War Ancestor of the Battle Gate, there was no way to compete with so many Ancestors.

"Really?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Bang!!!!

Another ancestor appeared, standing beside Ye Tian.

This ancestor is naturally Ye Tian's copy body, and his combat power is exactly the same.

"This ......"

When the Ancestor of Destruction and the Holy Ancestor saw this replica body, they were immediately stunned.

They knew that Ye Tian had a special clone, but they thought that there was only one clone, that is, the Qingye Ancestor.

didn't expect another clone to appear, and it was also the top ancestor combat power.

It is said that Ye Tian's clone died in battle, and he can continue to condense.

This is equivalent to having a top ancestor clone that cannot fall!

How does this work?

Immediately, some of the ancestors were so frightened that they immediately left, lest they be affected and killed.

At this moment, a figure appeared, and it was the Realm Ancestor.

Bang!!!

The Realm Ancestor was filled with the aura of a top ancestor, although it was very weak, it was just promoted, and it was also a top ancestor.

Obviously, the Realm Ancestor had gained too much benefit from the Dark Soul Domain, thus breaking the shackles and being promoted to the top Ancestor combat power.

Now, the Dark Forbidden Realm has given birth to four true top ancestors.

The Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, the Ancestor of the World, the Ancestor of Destruction, the Holy Ancestor.

Among them, Ye Tian alone can be regarded as two real top ancestor combat power, plus the realm ancestor, this side of the battle gate is equivalent to the combat power of three top ancestors, if it is not for the Qingye ancestor who cannot exert the top ancestor combat power in the outside world, it will be even more terrifying.

"Holy Ancestor, Ancestor of Destruction, if you want to deal with the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws of our Battle Gate, then let's fight!"

Jiezu said.

Three against two?

Moreover, one of the three top ancestors of the other party's combat power, one of them is not afraid of death, this can't win.

Immediately, the Holy Ancestor said, "Hahaha, I'm just joking!"

Obviously, the Holy Ancestor didn't want to offend the Battle Gate, after all, his Dark Holy Gate was in the Dark Holy Domain, if he offended the current Battle Gate, the Dark Holy Gate would not have a good time.

The Ancestor of Destruction was also instigated, in case Ye Tian and they instigated the Holy Ancestor to counterattack and besiege him, maybe there would be hope to keep him.

So, the Ancestor of Destruction also left immediately.
